reviews.comment:
La única completa en servicios entre Mar del Plata y Villa Gesell. De acuerdo a la temporada hay que esperar mucho para recargar combustible. Lindo lugar de esparcimiento para socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The only full-service gas station between Mar del Plata and Villa Gesell. Depending on the season, you might have to wait a long time to refuel. A nice recreational spot for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzLThiWTdRRRAB

Muy buena atención y hay que esperar mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and you have to wait for a lot of people

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay que hacer cola para cargar y hay muchas demoras en la atencion

(Translated by Google)
There's always a queue to recharge and there are long delays in service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNDdHMzJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, no apto para apurados. Todo a paso tranquilo. Lo mejor... El lugar para recreo, descansar bajo los árboles y si querés tiene parrilla para hacer un buen asadito.... Pero solo para socios del ACA.... Tal vez si se insiste.....

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, not for those in a hurry. Everything at a leisurely pace. The best part... The recreation area, relaxing under the trees, and if you want, there's a grill for a good barbecue... But only for ACA members... Maybe if you insist...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzem9XdU1nEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and quite fast despite there being many vehicles
